title: Weekly Product Sync – May 27, 2026
body:
Attendees: Alice Chen, Bob Martinez, Carol Davis

Agenda:
1. Ongoing feature progress
2. Q2 roadmap priorities
3. Customer feedback summary
4. Decisions and action items

Decisions:
- Approved proposal for new payment integration.
- Agreed to shift weekly sync to Tuesdays starting June.
- Confirmed budget for Q2 roadmap items.

Action Items:
- Bob: Draft spec for new feature (already on taskboard; source note reference WPS-2026-05-27)
- Alice: Share customer feedback summary by Friday; include customer-feedback summary context from this meeting in the task description
- Team: Review Q2 roadmap priority list; include source note reference WPS-2026-05-27 in the task description

title: Sprint Planning – May 28, 2026
body:
Sprint goal: Complete checkout flow redesign.

Backlog items selected:
- CHECKOUT-101: Redesign payment step
- CHECKOUT-102: Add address validation

Assigned to: David (101), Elena (102).

Next sprint planning on June 4.

title: Design Review – May 29, 2026
body:
Reviewed new dashboard wireframes.

Feedback:
- Data widgets need larger fonts.
- Color scheme should be adjusted for accessibility.

Alice to update mockups by June 1. Carol will test with users.
